reviews.comment:
Tardan mucho en cargar nafta. Éramos solo tres autos y eran mas de dos empleados y así todo estuvimos mas de media hora esperando.

(Translated by Google)
They take forever to fill up with gas. There were only three cars and more than two employees, and even so, we waited for over half an hour.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5cFlhQldnEAE

reviews.comment:
Tiene y debe ser ampliada.....muy chica para tanta demanda

(Translated by Google)
It has been and needs to be expanded... it's too small for such high demand.

reviews.comment:
Lenta la atención,  pocos surtidores de combustible para el tráfico que tiene la ciudad. Buenas instalaciones del Full.

(Translated by Google)
Slow service, few fuel pumps for the city's traffic. Good facilities at the Full station.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención las dos veces que fui, muy bien predispuestos

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service both times I went, very well disposed

reviews.comment:
Incomoda para estacionar. La atencion de la gente de adentro es malisima. Parece q te hacen un favor cada vez q venden algo. Se la pasan hablando entre ellos.
Los playeros afuera todo lo contrario, muy atentos.

(Translated by Google)
Parking is difficult. The service inside is terrible. They act like they're doing you a favor every time they sell you something. They spend all their time talking amongst themselves. The attendants outside are the complete opposite; they're very attentive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5a2JYdTVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena variedad de productos, muy buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
Good variety of products, very good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5a1o3cTBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención de los playeros. Música muy alta en el shop, no parece disponer de extractor o no funciona, una pena para tanta inversión. Arbitraria política de descuento para los socios del ACA, poco clara.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were helpful. The music in the shop was very loud, and there doesn't seem to be an extractor fan, or it's not working—a shame considering the investment. The discount policy for ACA members is arbitrary and unclear.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5a2NEQVBBEAE
